response: The Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT), consistently ranked as the #1 university in the world, is a prestigious institution founded in 1861. With a highly competitive acceptance rate of just 3.9%, MIT enrolls around 11,500 students and boasts a faculty of 1,069, including 98 Nobel laureates, supported by a staggering $24.6 billion endowment. Annual tuition stands at $57,590, reflecting its reputation for cutting-edge research and academic excellence.
